message:
refactor(llm,types): Simplify LLM module and add diary-related types

Final refinements to the LLM integration layer and supporting types.

## LLM Module Simplification (llm.ts)

- Streamlined prompt templates and helper functions
- Reduced overall complexity while maintaining functionality
- Better organization of related functions

## Type Additions (types.ts)

- Additional schema definitions for diary-related features
- Support for search anchor extraction types
- Alignment with new diary functionality

## TypeScript Configuration (tsconfig.json)

- Adjustments for proper module resolution
- Compatibility improvements for the codebase

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,17 +6,21 @@
     "moduleResolution": "bundler",
     "moduleDetection": "force",
     "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
+    "moduleSuffixes": [".ts", ".tsx", ".d.ts", ".js", ".jsx"],
     "noEmit": true,
-    "composite": true,
+    "composite": false,
     "strict": true,
     "downlevelIteration": true,
     "skipLibCheck": true,
     "jsx": "react-jsx",
     "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
     "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
     "allowJs": true,
-    "types": [
-      "bun-types"
-    ]
-  }
+    "types": ["bun-types", "node"]
+  },
+  "exclude": [
+    "dist",
+    "node_modules",
+    "competing_proposal_plans"
+  ]
 }
